title: Contact
headline: Let's talk about data platforms, analytics, and practical delivery.
lead: I am based in Toronto and available for data engineering opportunities that involve Snowflake, Python, SQL, analytics enablement, and governed data platforms.
summary: For fast replies, LinkedIn or email are the best ways to reach me.

sections.label: Focus
sections.title: Data engineering roles with real platform ownership.
sections.body: I am especially interested in teams that care about reliable pipelines, clear data models, analytics consumers, and the operational discipline around data products.
